headline: Jim Cramer Says He Thinks “The Stock of DoorDash Can Be Bought Here”
summary: DoorDash, Inc. (NASDAQ:DASH) is among the stocks in focus as Jim Cramer reviewed the S&P 500’s top performers and the Nasdaq 100’s biggest laggards for the first quarter. Cramer was bullish on the stock during the episode, as he remarked: Number seven, odd, one, DoorDash, down nearly 34% in the first quarter. That’s right, DoorDash. […]
